message:
test: expand edge-case and hardening coverage across 7 crates

ffs-block (19 new tests):
- Transaction staging: wrong data size rejection, empty commit returns
  zero, unknown txn abort returns zero
- Multi-block single-txn commit with flush verification
- Commit overwrites existing cached block
- Interleaved txn commit/abort isolation
- Restage overwrites prior staged data
- DeferredArcCache transaction operations
- Memory pressure level reporting
- Flush daemon configuration validation
- Dual lifecycle hook constructors

ffs-btree (8 new tests):
- Page capacity accessor
- Split delta partitioning
- Merge delta recording
- Lookup after delete, lookup nonexistent key
- Consolidation config threshold
- Chain length function
- Delete nonexistent key behavior

ffs-btrfs (15 new tests):
- Empty root set commit error
- Transaction accessors and multiple tree roots commit
- Track allocation/defer free abort paths
- Metadata alloc ENOSPC
- Extent refcount after alloc/flush
- Total used/capacity reporting
- Drain delayed refs, pending_for queries
- Sequential allocation ordering
- Block group and extent item serialization roundtrips

ffs-dir (27 new tests):
- Corruption detection: zero rec_len, unaligned rec_len, rec_len
  exceeding block, name_len exceeding rec_len
- remove_entry corruption guards matching add_entry
- Boundary conditions: single-entry block, max-name-length entries
- Read/write helper functions for u16/u32 little-endian
- Fill block to exhaustion, coalescing edge cases

ffs-inode (new tests):
- Edge-case and error-path test coverage for inode operations

ffs-xattr (28 new tests):
- align4 helper, build helpers
- check_write_permissions enforcement
- Parse/encode roundtrips for xattr entries
- entry_index lookup, external update paths
- Mixed namespace handling, empty values
- Encode error conditions

ffs-ondisk:
- Minor rustfmt formatting corrections in ext4.rs (no logic changes)

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Add 14 issue records tracking all work across this session

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
